creator: sperber@informatik.uni-tuebingen.de
text:
When I install with crypto and set the root password from sysinstall,
the installed system does not accept this password.  I assume sysinstall
uses DES for encryption whereas the installed system uses MD5.

Fix: 

Set the root password only after installation.
How-To-Repeat: 
Install with crypto, set root password, reboot.
